column5: Description

Player must move to the Chunk_GoTo, to recon the Base. Along the way the player will be attacked by Chunk_DestroyLance_Defenders. When the player has eliminated the Chunk_DestroyLance_Defenders, the player will then be able to complete the Chunk_OccupyRegion_Base to capture the base.Then the Chunk_DestroyLance_Reinforcements will come to dislodge the player. If they successfully defend and kill the reinforcements, they will have comepleted the objective.The Contract may also turn on the Chunk_BaseDefense_Turrets for added difficulty.

A simple no frills battle between the player's lance and 4-8 enemies.

Player will be tasked with placing artillery beacons for a strike by the employer forces. Players will need to place and protect 3 artillery beacons in a base, and then clear out before the artillery lands destroying the base and everything inside of it. Bonus pay is based on the speed at which is this done, potentially based on some level of destruction via the artilery is done.
